title: Deployment Config
description: API targets, publish schedule, fast-track rules, and integration credentials for one client deployment of the AJ Digital SEO/AEO Engine.

project_id.description: Sanity project ID. Retrieve from sanity.io/manage.

content_type.description: Sanity document type for published articles.

brief_type.description: Sanity document type for content briefs.

schedule.description: Cron-style schedule for each automated workflow.

content_mutation.description: W-05 cron expression (UTC). Default: 1st of month 09:00.

articles_per_week.description: Maximum number of articles to generate per W-01 run.

fast_track.description: Rules for auto-publish bypass (W-02 fast-track routing).

enabled.description: Master switch. Set false to force all articles through manual approval.

min_aeo_score.description: AEO score floor. Articles below this never fast-track regardless of other criteria.

max_warnings.description: Maximum validator warnings allowed for fast-track. Articles with >= this count go to manual approval.

auto_approve_local.description: Automatically fast-track articles targeting local keywords (intent: local).

auto_approve_low_kd_commercial.description: Automatically fast-track articles with difficulty very_low/low AND commercial/transactional intent.

telegram.description: Telegram bot settings for manual approval workflow and status alerts.

alert_on_kill.description: Send Telegram message when validator kills an article.

alert_on_publish.description: Send Telegram confirmation when article publishes.

alert_on_feedback.description: Send weekly feedback summary to Telegram.

gsc.description: Google Search Console settings for W-04 feedback collection.

site_url.description: Property URL as registered in GSC (must match exactly, including trailing slash if present).

lookback_days_this_week.description: Days of GSC data in the 'this week' window.

lookback_days_last_week.description: Days of GSC data in the 'last week' comparison window.

row_limit.description: Maximum rows returned from GSC API per call.

distribution.description: W-03 distribution settings — which channels to push on article publish.

social_posts.description: Generate social post copy on publish.

email_digest.description: Include article in next email digest.

gbp_post.description: Generate Google Business Profile post copy.

short_form_script.description: Generate a short-form video script (Reels/TikTok) on publish.

platforms.description: Social platforms to generate copy for.

articles_per_run.description: Max articles to mutate per monthly run.

min_article_age_days.description: Only mutate articles older than this many days.

n8n_credential_ids.description: n8n credential IDs to replace REPLACE_* placeholders in the workflow JSON. These are instance-specific and should NOT be committed to version control.

perplexity_api.description: Credential ID for Perplexity API HTTP node.

anthropic_api.description: Credential ID for Anthropic Claude node.

sanity_api.description: Credential ID for Sanity HTTP node.
